properties.after-effects: 1-6 hours | NOTE: The smell from the Diethyl ether will linger on the individual for days afterwards.
properties.summary: An industrial solvent which is sometimes used recreationally as a dissociative anaesthetic. It has a short length of action. Effects are similar to alcohol. Leaves one's breath tasting and smelling strongly of Diethyl ether for much longer than the experience lasts.
